label: Mobile Quick Access — calmer, full-bleed
items: On phones, the four Quick Access screens (/quick, Visual Lens, Today, Quick Capture) now run in focus mode: the top bar and side nav are hidden by default, so the three tiles and your task screens get the full screen to themselves.
A small menu button (☰) sits in the top-right of every Quick Access screen — tap it any time to slide in the full navigation drawer. Picking a destination closes the drawer automatically.
First-visit only: the button shows a 'Menu' label alongside the icon so you know where the nav went. After you tap it once, it stays as a minimal hamburger forever on that device.

label: Behind the scenes
items: The drawer reuses the same navigation links you already see on the side nav — no duplicated link list, no parallel UI to maintain.
Backdrop tap, Escape key, route change, and viewport resize all close the drawer cleanly.
